name: Pre-existing bad reviews + AI Overview harm - how to prove Google caused it?
description: Use analytics to show AI-specific drop.

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing bad reviews + AI Overview harm - how to prove Google caused it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use analytics to show AI-specific drop.
acceptedAnswer.description: Isolate AI impact via timestamps, A/B traffic analysis.[3] Key factors: Causation experts; baseline data. Tough but possible.
